root_text.an5.223:1.3: Bahubhaṇḍo hoti bahubhaṇḍasannicayo, bahubhesajjo hoti bahubhesajjasannicayo, bahukicco hoti bahukaraṇīyo byatto kiṅkaraṇīyesu, saṁsaṭṭho viharati gahaṭṭhapabbajitehi ananulomikena gihisaṁsaggena, tamhā ca āvāsā pakkamanto sāpekkho pakkamati.
root_text.an5.223:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ādīnavā atinivāse.
root_text.an5.223:2.3: Na bahubhaṇḍo hoti na bahubhaṇḍasannicayo, na bahubhesajjo hoti na bahubhesajjasannicayo, na bahukicco hoti na bahukaraṇīyo na byatto kiṅkaraṇīyesu, asaṁsaṭṭho viharati gahaṭṭhapabbajitehi ananulomikena gihisaṁsaggena, tamhā ca āvāsā pakkamanto anapekkho pakkamati.
root_text.an5.223:2.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ānisaṁsā samavatthavāse”ti.

translation_text.an5.223:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five drawbacks of overstaying.
translation_text.an5.223:1.3: You have a lot of stuff and store it up. You have a lot of medicine and store it up. You have a lot of duties and responsibilities, and become capable in whatever needs to be done. You mix closely with laypeople and renunciates, socializing inappropriately like a layperson. And when you leave that monastery, you miss it.
translation_text.an5.223:1.4: These are the five drawbacks of overstaying.
translation_text.an5.223:2.1: There are these five benefits of staying for a reasonable length of time.
translation_text.an5.223:2.3: You don’t have a lot of stuff and store it up. You don’t have a lot of medicine and store it up. You don’t have a lot of duties and responsibilities, or become capable in whatever needs to be done. You don’t mix closely with laypeople and renunciates, socializing inappropriately like a layperson. And when you leave that monastery, you don’t miss it.
translation_text.an5.223:2.4: These are the five benefits of staying for a reasonable length of time.”
